channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-12
item.description:
Our community has been buzzing with activity, and we're excited to share some updates with you. The scienceverse/metacheck project has made significant progress, with a recent commit to the `data_check` branch that improves the cache, retains original data, and enhances hardcoded folders. This development is particularly noteworthy as it lays the groundwork for more efficient data management and analysis. As our community continues to push the boundaries of open-source research, we celebrate the connections between projects like scienceverse/metacheck, which have the potential to inform and enhance one another. With these advancements, we're eager to see the ripple effects of innovation across our ecosystem. By working together and building upon each other's discoveries, we're driving progress and shaping the future of research.

21 commits across 2 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

regcheck20 commits
metacheck1 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the remote repository. The merge commit was made to integrate changes from the remote `feature-non-apa-newer` branch into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, "admin updates" were made, as per the commit message. No other branches were modified in these commits. The commits do not specify what the "admin updates" entail, only that they were made. Only the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was affected by these changes.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 2 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The staging branch was the primary focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. The precheck functionality was added and later separated as its own app, with the precheck and regcheck domains also being split, as stated in the commits "add precheck functionality", "split precheck and regcheck domains", and "separate precheck as its own app". The commit "change RR flow" modified the RR flow, while "remove dimension numbers for defaults" removed dimension numbers for defaults, and "strip beta references" removed beta references. Additionally, the commits "phase 5 prod prep", "phase 3 prod prep", and "commit phase 2 prod push" indicate that preparation work was done for production phases 2, 3, and 5. The commit "minor additions preclin" also made minor additions related to preclinical work.

2 commit(s) today:

  • cceb94d [staging] separate precheck as its own app — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
